vanilla_sound_events.rs

1# ! [doc = r" Sound event registry entries matching vanilla Minecraft's `SoundEvents`."] use crate :: sound_event :: { SoundEvent , SoundEventRegistry } ; use std :: borrow :: Cow ; use steel_utils :: Identifier ;
